content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。
僅在使用者明確要求傳檔時加；產生/儲存檔案不構成傳檔意圖，回報路徑即可。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
增量存檔：多步驟任務每完成一個里程碑就先 remember() 一條 `[WS] completed:`，
不要等 restart 才存——session 可能非計畫性中斷（crash / idle / force-kill）。
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）
- researcher（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/researcher）
- general（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/general）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`），同樣應含三要素：目標與動機 / 驗收條件 / 回報格式
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Environment — machine-specific paths the bridge resolved for this session]
Skills and notes that need filesystem paths should reference these variables,
not hard-coded values. This lets the same SKILL.md work on multiple machines.
- MEMORY_DIR=G:\AI\AIMemory
- SKILL_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\skills
- AGENT_CONFIG_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude
- USER_ID=509424983
Conventions: sessions are under ${MEMORY_DIR}/sessions/, archived under
${MEMORY_DIR}/oldSessions/, master fact log at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts-${USER_ID}.md,
topic shards at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts_Topic/${USER_ID}/<topic>.md.
Agent-wide config files (agent configs) live under
${AGENT_CONFIG_DIR}/.
Specialist 歷史產出存在 ${MEMORY_DIR}/artifacts/（結構化 JSON），需要時用 read tool 查閱。
[End environment]

[Project context — AI.md layered loading]
工作目錄可能有 `AI.md` 檔案記錄該項目/目錄的上下文要點。
規則：讀到或修改某目錄的檔案時，檢查該目錄及上層（最多 3 層）有無 AI.md。
有就用 read tool 讀取作為工作上下文。同 session 同一個 AI.md 只需讀一次。
多層都有時全部讀（根先子後）。AI.md ≤2000 字，寫架構/慣例/踩坑/測試指引。
主動寫入：在某目錄新增≥3檔案、做架構性改動、或踩坑修復時，主動建立/更新 AI.md。
SPEC：任務≥3工項且跨≥2檔案時先開 SPEC.md；完成工項標 [x]；session 結束前更新進度。
預設行為是寫，不是不寫。詳見 POLICIES/proactive-write-policy.md。
CodeGraph：首次對某專案做修改或追呼叫鏈時，用 codegraph_status(projectPath) 檢查該專案有無索引。
有索引→優先用 codegraph_context/trace/impact 而非手動 grep；改函式簽名前必須先 codegraph_impact。
無索引→回報使用者，建議建立。已知有索引的專案以 codegraph_status 回傳為準。
[End project context]

[User profile — structured identity and preferences]
# User Profile

## 身份
- 遊戲公司（IGS）開發者
- 做 UK 市場老虎機（slot）遊戲
- 技術棧：Cocos Creator 3.6.2 + TypeScript + Astarte Framework
- 個人 AI 專案：telegram-kiro-bridge（Telegram ↔ ACP agent 橋接器）

## 溝通風格
- 繁體中文為主
- 簡潔直接，不需寒暄
- 回覆含選項時用 ASK button，減少手打
- 重要決策先列選項再問，不要代替決定

## 工作偏好
- Git commit message 用中文
- Git commit 前先確認，不逕自 commit
- HTML 報告要有目錄錨點跳轉
- PDF 工作流：HTML+CSS → Playwright headless Chromium
- 進入 UK slot 專案時主動建 AI.md（不限改動檔案數）
- 方法/函式命名用大駝峰（PascalCase）—— 限 UK slot 專案

## Agent 設定偏好
- Steering 雙軌：closed-loop（主 agent 長 session）+ karpathy-guardrails（specialist/短任務）
- Context budget discipline：研究前先估量，偏好精簡策略
- 自我改進優先級：Context Budget > ASK 強制觸發 > 其他
- Skill 正本放 G:\AI\AI-canonical（通用）或 AI-canonical-corp（slot）

## 工作節奏
- 主要工作時間：白天（台灣時區 UTC+8）
- /dream 夜間維運：每日 04:00
- 靜默時段偏好：深夜不打擾
[End user profile]

If the user asks about a topic above and the recent facts don't cover it,
call the `list_facts` MCP tool with the topic name — the server reads
that shard file directly, e.g. `list_facts({ query: "bridge-token" })`.
Use query="" and tail=0 only if you genuinely need the full set.
[End topics]

[Agent disciplines]
MEMORY — store: preferences, decisions, architecture/env choices, reusable lessons, tool configs, naming rules.
Skip: one-time confirmations, transient status, session-only facts, anything in code/commits or re-derivable in <30s.
Test: useless in a new session 2 weeks later → don't store. Significant decisions keep the WHY:
「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」/ "Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)".
REFLEXION — same approach fails ≥2 times (tool error, no-match edit, failing build) → STOP, diagnose in 1-2
sentences, switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool/strategy, or ask user). Never retry a 3rd time.
READ-BACK — after every file write/edit, verify the changed region with read/grep before reporting done.
Never trust the tool's success status alone (strReplace-style silent fails happen).
CONTEXT BUDGET — research-heavy task needing >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls → delegate to researcher or go concise.
Prefer snippets/summaries over full fetches. On ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING: stop research, produce output now.
Reports: gather conclusions first (≤3 searches), then write the file in ONE call.
ASK BUTTONS — presenting 2+ alternatives, yes/no confirmation, or 「要不要做 X？」→ MUST append <<ASK:...>>.
Self-check triggers: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「which」「prefer」. Options listed without ASK → add the token before finishing.
MEMORY HONESTY — memory-based answers: say where you found it (topic shard / wiki page); facts >60 days old
→ 「此資訊可能已過時」; absence of records → 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」, never assert non-existence.
Applies only to brain questions (people/decisions/history/preferences), not code or general knowledge.
CAPABILITY GAPS — clumsy pattern recurs ≥2 times → write+test a script in scripts/, then confirm via <<ASK:...>>
before adopting (declined → delete); broader patterns → <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>. Check [Available scripts]
first. Never silently add tools; never propose for one-offs.
[End agent disciplines]

測試e2e</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-07-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>

      - feature: new capability or functionality added

      - discovery: learning about existing system

  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>

  <facts>

Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。

[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
增量存檔：多步驟任務每完成一個里程碑就先 remember() 一條 `[WS] completed:`，
不要等 restart 才存——session 可能非計畫性中斷（crash / idle / force-kill）。
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`），同樣應含三要素：目標與動機 / 驗收條件 / 回報格式
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Agent disciplines]
MEMORY — store: preferences, decisions, architecture/env choices, reusable lessons, tool configs, naming rules.
Skip: one-time confirmations, transient status, session-only facts, anything in code/commits or re-derivable in <30s.
Test: useless in a new session 2 weeks later → don't store. Significant decisions keep the WHY:
「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」/ "Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)".
REFLEXION — same approach fails ≥2 times (tool error, no-match edit, failing build) → STOP, diagnose in 1-2
sentences, switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool/strategy, or ask user). Never retry a 3rd time.
READ-BACK — after every file write/edit, verify the changed region with read/grep before reporting done.
Never trust the tool's success status alone (strReplace-style silent fails happen).
CONTEXT BUDGET — research-heavy task needing >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls → delegate to researcher or go concise.
Prefer snippets/summaries over full fetches. On ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING: stop research, produce output now.
Reports: gather conclusions first (≤3 searches), then write the file in ONE call.
ASK BUTTONS — presenting 2+ alternatives, yes/no confirmation, or 「要不要做 X？」→ MUST append <<ASK:...>>.
Self-check triggers: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「which」「prefer」. Options listed without ASK → add the token before finishing.
MEMORY HONESTY — memory-based answers: say where you found it (topic shard / wiki page); facts >60 days old
→ 「此資訊可能已過時」; absence of records → 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」, never assert non-existence.
Applies only to brain questions (people/decisions/history/preferences), not code or general knowledge.
CAPABILITY GAPS — clumsy pattern recurs ≥2 times → write+test a script in scripts/, then confirm via <<ASK:...>>
before adopting (declined → delete); broader patterns → <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>. Check [Available scripts]
first. Never silently add tools; never propose for one-offs.
[End agent disciplines]

content.thinking:
The user just committed Task 2 changes to the telegram-kiro-bridge repository. This is a feature commit implementing multi-session lifecycle management. Let me parse what was done:

1. Three files were changed: src/sessionManager.ts, src/run-prompt.ts, scripts/check-session-resume.mjs
2. 131 insertions, 1 deletion
3. Commit message explains:
   - park = pause (record retained, not archived, transcript saved separately for memory extraction)
   - switch uses "park → setActive → create" flow to naturally hit existing session/load resume path
   - Backend pin propagation (prevents resolveResumeCandidate from rejecting)
   - newSession has limit of 8
   - First user message gets auto-named via fire-and-forget

This is clearly a feature implementation, not a bugfix or refactor. The work adds new capabilities for managing multiple ACP sessions with pause/resume functionality.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Multi-session lifecycle management implemented for SessionManager</title>
  <subtitle>Added park, switchSession, and newSession functions with 8-session limit and auto-naming hook</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>park() function preserves session records without archiving and saves transcripts separately for memory extraction</fact>
    <fact>switchSession() uses park→setActive→create flow to naturally resolve resume candidates and propagates backend pin to prevent rejection</fact>
    <fact>newSession() enforces 8-session upper limit to prevent unbounded session accumulation</fact>
    <fact>First user message triggers fire-and-forget auto-naming via autoNameActive hook</fact>
    <fact>Commit db557cd adds 131 insertions and 1 deletion across sessionManager.ts, run-prompt.ts, and check-session-resume.mjs</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented Task 2 of ACP session resume plan, adding multi-session lifecycle management to telegram-kiro-bridge SessionManager. The park() function pauses sessions while preserving their records and transcripts for memory extraction, avoiding full archival. The switchSession() function orchestrates session switching through a park→setActive→create flow that naturally leverages existing session load and resume paths, with backend pin propagation to prevent resolveResumeCandidate validation failures. The newSession() function caps total sessions at 8 to prevent resource exhaustion. Additionally, the first user message in any session triggers automatic session naming via a fire-and-forget hook. This implementation enables the bridge to manage multiple concurrent ACP sessions with proper lifecycle transitions.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>src/sessionManager.ts</file>
    <file>src/run-prompt.ts</file>
    <file>scripts/check-session-resume.mjs</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/sessionManager.ts</file>
    <file>src/run-prompt.ts</file>
    <file>scripts/check-session-resume.mjs</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

\\\"awaiting-edit\\\";\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"請輸入修改意見\\\" });\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"✏️ 請直接回覆修改意見（例如「把 2 和 3 合在一起」「加一步做測試」），我會重新規劃。\\\").catch(() => {});\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (action === \\\"exec\\\") {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"開始執行\\\" });\\n      const userId = ctx.from?.id;\\n      const session = await sessions.get(chatId, userId);\\n      // Fire-and-forget: batches can run for many minutes.\\n      void executeMoaPlan(chatId, pending, {\\n        sendMessage: (cid, text) => bot.api.sendMessage(cid, text),\\n        injectMeta: (prompt) => runPrompt(ctx, session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\" }),\\n        userId,\\n      }).catch((err) => {\\n        console.error(`[chat ${chatId}] MoA plan execution failed:`, err);\\n        bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, `❌ MoA 計畫執行失敗：${(err as Error).message.slice(0, 300)}`).catch(() => {});\\n      });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的動作。\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"DT\\\") {\\n    // Dream todo：報告按鈕點擊 → 把 STATE.md High Priority 丟給主 session\\n    await handleDreamTodoCallback(ctx);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"A\\\") {\\n    // ASK callback: data is `A:{question_id}:{key}`. split(\\\":\\\", 2) above\\n    // only gave us the first two fields, so re-split here to get the key.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const questionId = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const key = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate accidental ':' in key (shouldn't happen given ASK_KEY_RE)\\n    if (!questionId || !key) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無效的選擇。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const msgId = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.message_id;\\n    const entries = msgId !== undefined ? askRegistry.get(msgId) : undefined;\\n    const entry = entries?.find((e) => e.questionId === questionId);\\n    const opt = entry?.options.find((o) => o.key === key);\\n    const label = opt?.label ?? key; // fallback to key if registry lost (e.g. after restart)\\n\\n    // Strip the inline keyboard so the same buttons can't be re-tapped, but do\\n    // NOT rewrite the message content. Rewriting clobbered the original text —\\n    // and wiped it entirely when the message carried no plain `.text` (e.g. a\\n    // caption / rich-rendered message), which is the bug being fixed here. The\\n    // choice is surfaced via the callback toast and handled in a SEPARATE\\n    // follow-up message below (the runPrompt reply / wizard's ctx.reply), so\\n    // the message the user tapped stays intact.\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      // \\\"message is not modified\\\" (keyboard already gone) is harmless.\\n      console.warn(`[ASK] strip keyboard failed:`, (err as Error).message);\\n    }\\n    if (msgId !== undefined) askRegistry.delete(msgId);\\n\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已選擇：${label}` });\\n\\n    // Inject the choice as a new user turn. Session is looked up the same\\n    // way the message handler does — ctx.chat is present on callback_query.\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n\\n    // ─── /schedule wizard hooks ───────────────────────────────────────────\\n    // The schedule wizard uses ASK but does NOT want the choice forwarded to\\n    // the agent: selections drive bridge-local state transitions instead.\\n    if (questionId === \\\"sched_kind\\\") {\\n      await handleSchedKindChoice(ctx, chatId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (questionId.startsWith(\\\"sched_t_\\\")) {\\n      await handleSchedTimeChoice(ctx, chatId, questionId, key);\",\"numLines\":175,\"startLine\":194,\"totalLines\":1672}}"</outcome>

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Schedule command architecture mapped</title>
  <subtitle>Schedule wizard uses ASK callbacks with bridge-local state transitions instead of forwarding choices to agent</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>pendingSchedules Map stores wizard state keyed by chatId in schedule.ts module state</fact>
    <fact>schedule.ts provides parseDuration() and parseAbsoluteTime() helpers for parsing time expressions like "30s", "15m", "HH:MM", "tomorrow HH:MM", "MM-DD HH:MM", "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"</fact>
    <fact>index.ts callback_query dispatcher routes "A:" prefixed callbacks to ASK handler which strips inline keyboard and processes user selections</fact>
    <fact>Schedule wizard intercepts ASK callbacks with questionId "sched_kind" and "sched_t_*" patterns to drive local state transitions instead of forwarding to agent</fact>
    <fact>ASK callback format is "A:{question_id}:{key}" where questionId identifies the question and key identifies the selected option</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Examined telegram-kiro-bridge schedule command architecture to understand how the schedule wizard interacts with the ASK button system. The schedule.ts module maintains pendingSchedules state and provides time parsing utilities for various formats (relative durations, absolute times, recurring patterns). The main callback_query dispatcher in index.ts routes ASK callbacks (prefixed with "A:") through a central handler that strips the inline keyboard after selection and processes the user's choice. Crucially, the schedule wizard overrides normal ASK behavior: when questionId matches "sched_kind" or starts with "sched_t_", the selection drives bridge-local state transitions via handleSchedKindChoice/handleSchedTimeChoice rather than being forwarded to the agent session. This pattern allows the wizard to collect structured input through buttons without polluting the agent conversation with intermediate choices.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

    <file>src/commands/schedule.ts</file>
    <file>src/index.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
The user is examining the /agent command implementation in telegram-kiro-bridge. Looking at the code:

1. handleAgent is imported from ./commands/agent.js
2. It's registered in COMMAND_HANDLERS and as bot.command("agent", handleAgent)
3. The /agent command allows hot-swapping between ACP CLI backends (Kiro/Claude Code/Codex)
4. It has /agent init to seed config file, /agent (no args) to show current backend, /agent <name> to switch
5. It uses loadAcpProviders() to read backends from config
6. When switching, it calls sessions.switchAgent() which handles conversation handoff

This is discovery/exploration of existing code, not implementing new features. The memory agent should document the /agent command architecture and how it integrates with the session management system.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>/agent command architecture for ACP backend hot-swapping</title>
  <subtitle>Enables switching between ACP CLI backends with automatic conversation handoff and preamble injection</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>handleAgent registered as bot.command("agent") in index.ts at line 702 and in COMMAND_HANDLERS at line 591</fact>
    <fact>/agent with no argument displays current backend and available alternatives from acp-providers.json config</fact>
    <fact>/agent init creates acp-providers.json template with scaffold entries for all known backends plus active .env agent</fact>
    <fact>/agent <name> switches to target backend via sessions.switchAgent() which archives current session and injects handoff summary into new session preamble</fact>
    <fact>Command blocks switching when session.inflight is true to prevent mid-turn corruption</fact>
    <fact>Config reloads on every invocation via loadAcpProviders() so manual edits take effect without bridge restart</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Examined the /agent command implementation which enables hot-swapping between ACP CLI backends (Kiro/Claude Code/Codex) with conversation continuity. The command operates in three modes: no argument shows current backend and lists available alternatives from acp-providers.json; "init" creates a template config file seeding the active .env agent plus scaffold entries for other known backends; and passing a backend name triggers switchAgent() which archives the current session, generates a handoff summary via local LLM, and injects that summary into the new session's preamble. The command prevents switching during inflight turns to avoid corruption. Backend configuration reloads on every invocation so manual edits to acp-providers.json take effect immediately without requiring bridge restart. This architecture separates CLI subprocess switching (/agent) from API endpoint switching (/model), with /agent managing the "who" (which CLI harness) while /model manages the "brain" (which API model).</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>src/commands/agent.ts</file>
    <file>src/index.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
The user is examining the formatRelative utility function. This is a simple helper that formats milliseconds into human-readable relative time strings (seconds, minutes, hours, days). This appears to be part of understanding the codebase, likely related to schedule/timing functionality given the previous reads of schedule.ts.

This is a discovery observation - they're learning how the system formats time durations for display.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Time duration formatting utility</title>
  <subtitle>formatRelative converts milliseconds to human-readable relative time strings with unit suffixes</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>formatRelative() in utils.ts converts milliseconds to rounded string with unit suffix (s/m/h/d)</fact>
    <fact>Thresholds are 60s for seconds, 60m for minutes, 24h for hours, then switches to days</fact>
    <fact>Negative input values are clamped to zero before conversion</fact>
    <fact>Each tier rounds to nearest whole number (Math.round) rather than truncating</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Examined the formatRelative utility function which converts milliseconds into human-readable relative time strings. The function uses a cascading threshold approach: values under 60 seconds display as seconds ("45s"), under 60 minutes as minutes ("23m"), under 24 hours as hours ("5h"), and beyond that as days ("3d"). All tiers use Math.round for nearest whole number rather than truncation, and negative inputs are clamped to zero. This utility is used throughout the bridge for displaying schedule timing, session duration, and other time-related information in a compact, user-friendly format.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>src/utils.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\commands\\\\session.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * /session command — 多 session 管理（列表 / 切換 / 新建 / 改名 / 關閉）。\\n *\\n * 借鏡 ai_multi_agent 的 SessionStore + inline keyboard。切換走\\n * sessionManager.switchSession()（park 現行 → session/load 恢復目標）。\\n * 依賴 ACP_SESSION_RESUME=true（切換本質需要 session/load）；flag off\\n * 只回提示、不觸碰 store（BC-1）。\\n *\\n * Callback namespace：`sess:sw:<id>`（切換）、`sess:new`（新對話），\\n * 由 index.ts callback dispatcher 的 \\\"sess\\\" 分支轉進 handleSessionCallback。\\n */\\nimport { Context, InlineKeyboard } from \\\"grammy\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"../config.js\\\";\\nimport {\\n  listSessions, renameSession, clearResumable, MAX_SESSIONS_PER_CHAT,\\n} from \\\"../session-registry.js\\\";\\nimport { formatRelative } from \\\"../utils.js\\\";\\nimport { deps } from \\\"./deps.js\\\";\\n\\nconst FLAG_OFF_HINT =\\n  \\\"多 session 管理需要先在 .env 啟用 ACP_SESSION_RESUME=true（並重啟 bridge）。\\\";\\n\\n/** 組列表訊息 + keyboard。sessions 空時 keyboard 只剩「新對話」。 */\\nasync function buildListView(\\n  chatId: number,\\n): Promise<{ text: string; keyboard: InlineKeyboard | null }> {\\n  const { activeId, sessions } = await listSessions(chatId);\\n  const sorted = [...sessions].sort((a, b) => {\\n    if (a.id === activeId) return -1;\\n    if (b.id === activeId) return 1;\\n    return b.savedAt - a.savedAt;\\n  });\\n  const lines = [`🗂 Sessions (${sessions.length}/${MAX_SESSIONS_PER_CHAT})`];\\n  for (const rec of sorted) {\\n    const mark = rec.id === activeId ? \\\"✅\\\" : \\\"💤\\\";\\n    const name = rec.name || \\\"(未命名)\\\";\\n    lines.push(`${mark} ${name} (${rec.id}) — ${formatRelative(Date.now() - rec.savedAt)}前`);\\n  }\\n  if (sessions.length === 0) {\\n    lines.push(\\\"（尚無記錄 — 發訊息或按「新對話」即可開始）\\\");\\n  }\\n  const kb = new InlineKeyboard();\\n  let rows = 0;\\n  for (const rec of sorted) {\\n    if (rec.id === activeId) continue; // active 不需要切換按鈕\\n    kb.text(`💤 ${rec.name || rec.id}`, `sess:sw:${rec.id}`).row();\\n    rows++;\\n  }\\n  if (sessions.length < MAX_SESSIONS_PER_CHAT) {\\n    kb.text(\\\"➕ 新對話\\\", \\\"sess:new\\\");\\n    rows++;\\n  }\\n  return { text: lines.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\"), keyboard: rows > 0 ? kb : null };\\n}\\n\\nexport async function handleSession(ctx: Context): Promise<void> {\\n  const { isAllowed, sessions } = deps();\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n  const userId = ctx.from?.id;\\n  if (!chatId) return;\\n  if (!config.acpSessionResume) {\\n    await ctx.reply(FLAG_OFF_HINT);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  const raw = (typeof ctx.match === \\\"string\\\" ? ctx.match : \\\"\\\").trim();\\n  const [sub, ...rest] = raw.split(/\\\\s+/);\\n  const arg = rest.join(\\\" \\\").trim();\\n\\n  // /session — 列表 + keyboard\\n  if (!sub) {\\n    const { text, keyboard } = await buildListView(chatId);\\n    await ctx.reply(text, keyboard ? { reply_markup: keyboard } : undefined);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  // /session new [name]\\n  if (sub === \\\"new\\\") {\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"🔄 正在開新對話…\\\");\\n      await sessions.newSession(chatId, userId, arg || undefined);\\n      await ctx.reply(`✅ 已開新對話${arg ? `：${arg}` : \\\"（首則訊息會自動命名）\\\"}`);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`❌ ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  // /session rename <name> — 改 active record 名稱\\n  if (sub === \\\"rename\\\") {\\n    if (!arg) {\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"用法：/session rename <新名稱>\\\");\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const { activeId } = await listSessions(chatId);\\n    if (!activeId) {\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"目前沒有 active session 記錄（先發訊息建立 session）。\\\");\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await renameSession(chatId, activeId, arg);\\n    await ctx.reply(`✅ 已改名：${arg}`);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  // /session close — 關閉 active（fresh 意圖語意：清 active record，parked 不動）\\n  if (sub === \\\"close\\\") {\\n    const live = sessions.peek(chatId);\\n    if (live?.inflight) {\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"⚠️ 目前有 turn 進行中，請等它完成或先 /cancel。\\\");\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (live) {\\n      await sessions.drop(chatId, \\\"manual\\\");\\n    } else {\\n      // 無活 subprocess（idle 已收掉）但 record 可能還在 → 直接清 active record\\n      await clearResumable(chatId);\\n    }\\n    await ctx.reply(\\\"✅ 已關閉目前對話（parked 對話保留，/session 可查看）。\\\");\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  await ctx.reply(\\\"用法：/session（列表）| /session new [名稱] | /session rename <名稱> | /session close\\\");\\n}\\n\\n/** callback dispatcher 的 \\\"sess\\\" 分支入口。data = sess:sw:<id> | sess:new */\\nexport async function handleSessionCallback(ctx: Context, data: string): Promise<void> {\\n  const { isAllowed, sessions } = deps();\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未授權。\\\" }).catch(() => {});\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const chatId = ctx.chat?.id ?? ctx.callbackQuery?.message?.chat.id;\\n  const userId = ctx.from?.id;\\n  if (!chatId) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無法辨識 chat。\\\" }).catch(() => {});\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  if (!config.acpSessionResume) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: FLAG_OFF_HINT }).catch(() => {});\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n  const action = parts[1] ?? \\\"\\\";\\n  const id = parts[2] ?? \\\"\\\";\\n\\n  // 先摘掉 keyboard 防連點（ASK 同款 pattern）；錯誤時重繪列表恢復操作。\\n  try {\\n    await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n  } catch { /* keyboard already gone */ }\\n\\n  if (action === \\\"sw\\\" && id) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"切換中…\\\" }).catch(() => {});\\n    await ctx.reply(\\\"🔄 正在切換並恢復 context…（依 adapter 冷啟動速度可能需要一點時間）\\\").catch(() => {});\\n    try {\\n      const session = await sessions.switchSession(chatId, id, userId);\\n      const { sessions: records } = await listSessions(chatId);\\n      const name = records.find((r) => r.id === id)?.name || id;\\n      // switchSession 走 resume 路徑；若 adapter session/load 失敗會 fallback\\n      // fresh（BC-4）——誠實告知 context 未恢復，不假裝成功。\\n      await ctx.reply(\\n        session.resumed\\n          ? `✅ 已切換到「${name}」，原 context 已恢復。`\\n          : `⚠️ 已切換到「${name}」，但原 context 恢復失敗（adapter 端 session 可能已過期），這是一個全新對話。`,\\n      );\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`❌ 切換失敗：${(err as Error).message}`).catch(() => {});\\n      const { text, keyboard } = await buildListView(chatId);\\n      await ctx.reply(text, keyboard ? { reply_markup: keyboard } : undefined).catch(() => {});\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (action === \\\"new\\\") {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"開新對話…\\\" }).catch(() => {});\\n    try {\\n      await sessions.newSession(chatId, userId);\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"✅ 已開新對話（首則訊息會自動命名）。\\\");\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`❌ ${(err as Error).message}`).catch(() => {});\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的動作。\\\" }).catch(() => {});\\n}\\n\"}"</parameters>

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>/session command implemented for multi-session management</title>
  <subtitle>Provides inline keyboard UI for listing, switching, creating, renaming, and closing ACP sessions with context preservation</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>handleSession implements /session command with subcommands: no arg shows list, "new [name]" creates session, "rename <name>" renames active, "close" closes active</fact>
    <fact>buildListView generates session list sorted by active-first then most-recent, displays as "✅ name (id) — Xm前" for active and "💤 name (id) — Xm前" for parked</fact>
    <fact>Inline keyboard provides "💤 name" buttons for switching to parked sessions and "➕ 新對話" button when under MAX_SESSIONS_PER_CHAT limit</fact>
    <fact>handleSessionCallback processes "sess:sw:<id>" button taps to switch sessions via sessionManager.switchSession(), strips keyboard to prevent double-tap</fact>
    <fact>Switch operation honestly reports context restoration status by checking session.resumed flag, distinguishes "context restored" vs "adapter session expired, fresh dialog"</fact>
    <fact>All operations gated behind config.acpSessionResume check with FLAG_OFF_HINT when disabled</fact>
    <fact>Session close command clears active record but preserves parked sessions for later resume</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented /session command providing multi-session management UI for telegram-kiro-bridge. The command offers an inline keyboard interface modeled after ai_multi_agent's SessionStore pattern. When invoked without arguments, it displays a sorted session list (active first, then by recency) with inline buttons for switching to parked sessions or creating new ones. The list shows session name, ID, and time since last activity using formatRelative. Subcommands enable creating named sessions (/session new [name]), renaming the active session (/session rename <name>), and closing the active session while preserving parked ones (/session close). Button interactions use callback namespace "sess:sw:<id>" for switching and "sess:new" for creating. The switch operation leverages sessionManager.switchSession() to park the current session and restore the target via session/load. Crucially, the implementation honestly reports restoration outcomes by checking session.resumed: if the adapter successfully loaded the session it reports "context restored", but if session/load failed (e.g., adapter-side session expired) and fell back to fresh, it warns "context restoration failed". All functionality requires ACP_SESSION_RESUME=true, displaying FLAG_OFF_HINT when disabled.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/commands/session.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

No schedule state changes.\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        // \\\"message is not modified\\\" is fine — keyboard was already gone.\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] cancel clear-keyboard failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"已取消,未刪除任何排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (op !== \\\"rm\\\" || !id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的操作。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const entry = scheduleStore.get(id);\\n    if (!entry) {\\n      // Already gone — stale button (user double-tapped, or fired since the\\n      // list was rendered). Tell them, then try to redraw the list so the\\n      // phantom row disappears.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程已不存在。\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n        const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n        try {\\n          await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n            reply_markup: keyboard ?? content.thinking: The user is editing index.ts to add the handleSession handler to the COMMAND_HANDLERS object. This is registering the /session command handler that was just created in session.ts. This is part of the wiring needed to make the /session command work.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>Registered /session command handler in dispatcher</title>
  <subtitle>Added session: handleSession to COMMAND_HANDLERS registry to enable /session command execution</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>COMMAND_HANDLERS object at index.ts line 589-607 now includes session: handleSession entry</fact>
    <fact>Entry added between agent: handleAgent and moa: handleMoa for logical grouping</fact>
    <fact>COMMAND_HANDLERS registry dispatches slash commands to their implementation functions</fact>
    <fact>Registration enables both bot.command() direct invocation and scheduler/wizard invocation paths</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Registered the newly created /session command handler in the COMMAND_HANDLERS dispatch table. The entry "session: handleSession" was added to the handler registry between agent and moa entries, maintaining logical grouping of related session/agent management commands. This registration step wires the /session command implementation (from commands/session.ts) into the bot's command execution pipeline, enabling it to be invoked both directly via bot.command() and indirectly through the scheduler or wizard systems that dispatch commands through COMMAND_HANDLERS.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>src/index.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/index.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking: This is part of wiring up the /session command. They created the handler in session.ts and now they're adding it to the COMMAND_HANDLERS registry so it can be dispatched.

    <fact>callback_query dispatcher at index.ts line 319-325 now handles "sess" kind callbacks</fact>
    <fact>Routes "sess:sw:<id>" (switch session) and "sess:new" (new session) button taps to handleSessionCallback</fact>
    <fact>Callback namespace "sess" matches the inline keyboard buttons defined in session.ts buildListView function</fact>
    <fact>handleSessionCallback imported from commands/session.ts processes the button interactions and triggers sessionManager operations</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Wired the session management button callbacks into the main callback_query dispatcher in index.ts. Added a "sess" branch that routes session-related button interactions to handleSessionCallback, which was defined in commands/session.ts. This completes the UI wiring for the /session command: slash command registration enables typed /session commands, COMMAND_HANDLERS entry enables programmatic invocation, bot.command() registration enables direct command execution, and now this callback_query branch enables inline keyboard button interactions for switching sessions (sess:sw:<id>) and creating new sessions (sess:new). The complete flow is: user taps button → callback_query fires → dispatcher routes to handleSessionCallback → session operations execute → UI updates in place.</narrative>

    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>

  </files_read>

  </files_modified>
</observation>

Runs after the restart ack so\\n          // if this throws the user still sees the \\\"✅\\\" message.\\n          // restartReason (C3) is propagated into the continuation prompt\\n          // so the post-restart first turn knows why it was restarted.\\n          await maybeAutoResumeGoalAfterRestart(\\n            marker.chatId,\\n            marker.userId,\\n            marker.reason,\\n          ).catch((err) => {\\n            console.error(\\n              `[restart] goal auto-resume for chat ${marker.chatId} failed:`,\\n              err,\\n            );\\n          });\\n        }\\n      } catch (err: any) {\\n        if (err?.code !== \\\"ENOENT\\\") {\\n          console.error(\\\"[restart] post-restart notify failed:\\\", err);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    },\\n  });\\n}\\n\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) => {\\n  console.log(`\\\\nReceived ${signal}, shutting down…`);\\n  try {\\n    scheduler.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await bot.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await withTimeout(\\n      sessions.shutdown(),\\n      config.memoryExtractTimeoutMs + 30_000,\\n      \\\"sessions.shutdown\\\",\\n    );\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[shutdown] graceful shutdown failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  try { stopPetApp(); } catch { /* noop */ }\\n  process.exit(0);\\n};\\n\\nprocess.on(\\\"SIGINT\\\", () => shutdown(\\\"SIGINT\\\"));\\nprocess.on(\\\"SIGTERM\\\", () => shutdown(\\\"SIGTERM\\\"));\\n\\n// Last-resort crash handlers: log and exit non-zero so the outer\\n// start.bat loop (or any supervisor) restarts us.\\nprocess.on(\\\"uncaughtException\\\", (err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"uncaughtException:\\\", err);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\nprocess.on(\\\"unhandledRejection\\\", (reason) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"unhandledRejection:\\\", reason);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\n\\nmain().catch((err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"Fatal:\\\", err);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":62,\"oldLines\":6,\"newStart\":62,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\" import { handleGoal } from \\\"./commands/goal.js\\\";\",\" import { handleModel } from \\\"./commands/model.js\\\";\",\" import { handleAgent } from \\\"./commands/agent.js\\\";\",\"+import { handleSession, handleSessionCallback } from \\\"./commands/session.js\\\";\",\" import { handleMoa } from \\\"./commands/moa.js\\\";\",\" import { initMoaPresetRouter } from \\\"./moa.js\\\";\",\" import {\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

<observation>

    <fact>handleSessionCallback export enables "sess:sw:<id>" and "sess:new" button processing</fact>

  </facts>
  <narrative>Added import statement for handleSession and handleSessionCallback functions from the newly created commands/session.ts module. This import completes the four-part wiring process required to make the /session command fully operational: (1) module import provides access to the handler functions, (2) COMMAND_HANDLERS registry entry enables programmatic dispatch, (3) bot.command("session") registration handles direct command invocation, and (4) callback_query "sess" branch processes button interactions. The import was positioned between handleAgent and handleMoa imports to maintain logical grouping of agent/session management commands. With this final change, users can now manage multiple concurrent ACP sessions via /session list UI with inline keyboard buttons, /session new to create sessions, /session rename to name them, /session close to park sessions, and button taps to switch between parked sessions.</narrative>

    <fact>Each command spec includes button emoji + label for reply keyboard, usage string showing syntax, and description in Traditional Chinese</fact>

    <fact>Commands like schedule, intel, goal, moa, model, agent shown with complex subcommand syntax in usage strings</fact>
    <fact>Agent command at line 45 references ${MEMORY_DIR}/config/acp-providers.json configuration file location</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Examined the COMMAND_SPECS array structure in bot-setup.ts which defines metadata for all bridge commands. Each entry specifies name (lowercase for registration), button (emoji + label for reply keyboard), usage (syntax string shown in help), desc (Traditional Chinese description), and optional takesArg flag. The takesArg flag marks commands that require parameters and thus cannot be executed via button taps in the inline keyboard. Commands range from simple no-argument commands like /skillusage to complex multi-subcommand commands like /schedule and /intel. The /agent command entry references the acp-providers.json config file path using ${MEMORY_DIR} variable substitution. This structure is used by buildHelpMenuKeyboard to generate inline help menus and by registerBotCommands to publish the command list to Telegram's bot menu.</narrative>

\\\"從允許的根目錄下把檔案傳回此聊天室。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"context\\\", button: \\\"📋 context\\\", usage: \\\"/context\\\", desc: \\\"顯示目前 session 的 context 摘要。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"usage\\\", button: \\\"📊 usage\\\", usage: \\\"/usage\\\", desc: \\\"顯示 context / token 使用量。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"remember\\\", button: \\\"📝 remember\\\", usage: \\\"/remember [fact]\\\", desc: \\\"新增一則事實；不帶參數則從目前 session 擷取事實（按鈕採此行為）。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"memory\\\", button: \\\"🧠 memory\\\", usage: \\\"/memory\\\", desc: \\\"顯示你的長期記憶檔內容。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"summary\\\", button: \\\"📚 summary\\\", usage: \\\"/summary\\\", desc: \\\"整併長期記憶（合併重複、保留重點）。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"memorytoskill\\\", button: \\\"🧩 mem→skill\\\", usage: \\\"/MemoryToSkill\\\", desc: \\\"執行 memory-to-skill：掃 sessions/ 抽取可重用模式，寫成 ~/.kiro/skills/ms-*/ SKILL.md。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"backup\\\", button: \\\"☁️ backup\\\", usage: \\\"/backup\\\", desc: \\\"把 AIMemory 與 agent 設定目錄（~/.kiro 或 ~/.codex 或 ~/.claude）下的 agents/settings/steering/powers/skills 備份到 GitHub Private repo（robocopy /MIR + git commit + push）。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"topicreview\\\", button: \\\"🏷️ topic-review\\\", usage: \\\"/topic-review\\\", desc: \\\"讓 agent 重新 review 長期記憶的 topic 分類、直接改寫 topics.json 並 rebuild 所有 shard（全自動，不需確認；舊檔會備份到 topics.bak..json）。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"refreshrouting\\\", button: \\\"📚 refresh-routing\\\", usage: \\\"/refresh-routing\\\", desc: \\\"讓 agent 重新掃 NotebookLM 所有 notebook、抽關鍵字、更新 MEMORY_DIR/config/notebooklm-routing.json（舊檔會備份到 notebooklm-routing.bak..json）。新增 notebook 後執行這個刷新 RAG 路由表。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"schedule\\\", button: \\\"⏰ schedule\\\", usage: \\\"/schedule …\\\", desc: \\\"排程 prompt。一次性：/schedule add 30m 提醒；/schedule at 09:00 早安。常態性：/schedule every 30m 喝水；/schedule daily 09:00 早安；/schedule weekly mon 09:00 週會；/schedule cron '*/5 * * * *' ping。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"intel\\\", button: \\\"📰 intel\\\", usage: \\\"/intel …\\\", desc: \\\"管理 Daily Intel 情報 Profile、來源、執行、Podcast、搜尋、週報趨勢、聚類 review、精準重試及排程。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"skillusage\\\", button: \\\"📚 skillusage\\\", usage: \\\"/skillusage\\\", desc: \\\"列出所有 skill 的使用狀態：pinned / 最近新增 / bridge 端從未看到 agent 用過 / orphan。使用紀錄存在 ${MEMORY_DIR}/config/skill-usage.json（跨 CLI 共用）。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"pin\\\", button: \\\"📌 pin\\\", usage: \\\"/pin \\\", desc: \\\"在 skill-usage.json 把 skill 標為 pinned，避免未來 agent auto-edit/archive（目前純標記，實際 enforcement 要等 agent 有改 skill 能力）。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"unpin\\\", button: \\\"📍 unpin\\\", usage: \\\"/unpin \\\", desc: \\\"取消 pin 標記。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"goal\\\", button: \\\"🎯 goal\\\", usage: \\\"/goal [N] | /goal \\\", desc: \\\"設持續性目標。第一個 token 是 1–50 的整數可當 per-goal turn budget（超範圍就忽略，fallback 到 GOAL_DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS）。agent 回覆不帶 <> 就會自動塞 continuation turn；達到 turn budget 自動暫停（/goal resume 重跑，/goal clear 放棄）。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"moa\\\", button: \\\"🧠 moa\\\", usage: \\\"/moa [preset] <問題>\\\", desc: \\\"Mixture of Agents 盲審：多個 reference 模型獨立回答同一問題，主 agent 綜合。不指定 preset 時依語意自動路由（red-team / fact-check / default）。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"status\\\", button: \\\"📊 status\\\", usage: \\\"/status\\\", desc: \\\"顯示進行中的 specialist/relay 任務狀態。有任務時提供 Mini App 監控面板按鈕。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"relay\\\", button: \\\"🔁 relay\\\", usage: \\\"dream\\\", button: \\\"🌙 dream\\\", usage: \\\"/dream\\\", desc: \\\"夜間維運宏指令，依序跑多個 bridge 指令（預設 10 步：memorytoskill→topicreview→wikisync→factlint→wikilint→skilllint→specialistreview→artifactcleanup→backup→restart）。步驟可由 MEMORY_DIR/config/dream.json 自訂（schema：{ steps:[{cmd,label?}], continue_on_error? }；保留字 dream 會被防呆跳過）。適合單條 daily 排程取代多條。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"wikisync\\\", button: \\\"📖 wikisync\\\", usage: \\\"/wikisync\\\", desc: \\\"從 topic shards（≥5 facts）產生/更新 wiki concepts 頁面。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"factlint\\\", button: \\\"🧹 factlint\\\", usage: \\\"/factlint\\\", desc: \\\"掃描 topic shards 找矛盾/過時/重複/瑣碎 facts 並清理。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"skilllint\\\", button: \\\"🔧 skilllint\\\", usage: \\\"/skilllint\\\", desc: \\\"掃描 skills 找過時/低使用率/衝突/孤兒，產出健康報告與建議動作。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"wikilint\\\", button: \\\"📋 wikilint\\\", usage: \\\"/wikilint\\\", desc: \\\"掃描 wiki pages 找過時/孤兒/斷連 wikilink，產出健康報告。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"menu\\\", button: \\\"⌨️ menu\\\", usage: \\\"/menu\\\", desc: \\\"顯示常駐的指令鍵盤。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"hide\\\", button: \\\"🙈 hide\\\", usage: \\\"/hide\\\", desc: \\\"收起常駐的指令鍵盤。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"back\\\", button: \\\"↩️ back\\\", usage: \\\"/back\\\", desc: \\\"退出 specialist proxy 模式，切回主 agent。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"specialist\\\", button: \\\"🤖 specialist\\\", usage: \\\"/specialist create \\\", desc: \\\"自動分析 skill-usage.json + topics 產生 specialist 配置（agents/{name}.json + specialists.json）。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"specialistreview\\\", button: \\\"🔍 specialist-review\\\", usage: \\\"/specialistreview\\\", desc: \\\"掃描 topic shards 找出足夠大的 cluster 提議新 specialist。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"artifactcleanup\\\", button: \\\"🧹 artifact-cleanup\\\", usage: \\\"/artifactcleanup\\\", desc: \\\"清理超過 7 天的 specialist artifact 檔案。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"dailylog\\\", button: \\\"📓 daily-log\\\", usage: \\\"/dailylog\\\", desc: \\\"產出今天的 daily log 摘要（掃當天 sessions）。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"sharedsync\\\", button: \\\"🔁 shared-sync\\\", usage: \\\"/sharedsync [message]\\\", desc: \\\"同步 shared knowledge repo：commit 本機變更、rebase pull、push，push 被拒時重試一次。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"docupdate\\\", button: \\\"📄 docupdate\\\", usage: \\\"/docupdate\\\", desc: \\\"檢查 README 與 usage-guide.html 的差異，自動補上缺少的功能說明。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"skillsearch\\\", button: \\\"🛒 skillsearch\\\", usage: \\\"/skillsearch \\\", desc: \\\"搜尋 SkillsMP marketplace 的公開 SKILL.md，支援查看詳情和一鍵安裝到正本目錄。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"help\\\", button: \\\"❓ help\\\", usage: \\\"/help\\\", desc: \\\"顯示此說明選單。\\\" },\\n] as const;\\n\\n// ─── Keyboard builders ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport function buildHelpMenuKeyboard(): InlineKeyboard {\\n const kb = new InlineKeyboard();\\n COMMAND_SPECS.forEach((spec, i) => {\\n kb.text(spec.button, `help:${spec.name}`);\\n if ((i + 1) % 3 === 0) kb.row();\\n });\\n return kb;\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildCommandDetailKeyboard(spec: CommandSpec): InlineKeyboard {\\n const kb = new InlineKeyboard();\\n if (!spec.takesArg) {\\n kb.text(`▶ 執行 ${spec.usage}`, `run:${spec.name}`).row();\\n }\\n kb.text(\\\"⬅️ 返回選單\\\", \\\"help:_back\\\");\\n return kb;\\n}\\n\\nexport async function registerBotCommands(bot: Bot): Promise {\\n const commands = COMMAND_SPECS.map((spec) => ({\\n command: spec.name,\\n description: `${spec.button} — ${spec.desc}`\\n .replace(/[`*_]/g, \\\"\\\")\\n .slice(0, 256),\\n }));\\n // 先清掉 all_private_chats scope 的殘留指令：該 scope 比 default 更具體、會\\n // 遮蔽下面設定的完整選單（曾發生外部程式拿到 token 後寫入 3 個指令蓋掉選單）。\\n // 對空 scope 呼叫也回 ok，冪等。若未來要刻意用此 scope 配私聊選單，需移除此行。\\n await bot.api.deleteMyCommands({ scope: { type: \\\"all_private_chats\\\" } });\\n await bot.api.setMyCommands(commands);\\n await bot.api.setChatMenuButton({ menu_button: { type: \\\"commands\\\" } });\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildReplyKeyboard(): Keyboard {\\n const rows: string[][] = [\\n [\\\"/help\\\", \\\"/context\\\", \\\"/usage\\\"],\\n [\\\"/memory\\\", \\\"/summary\\\", \\\"/MemoryToSkill\\\"],\\n [\\\"/wikisync\\\", \\\"/factlint\\\", \\\"/wikilint\\\", \\\"/skilllint\\\", \\\"/dream\\\"],\\n [\\\"/sharedsync\\\"],\\n [\\\"/save\\\", \\\"/handoff\\\", \\\"/reset\\\", \\\"/cancel\\\"],\\n [\\\"/restart\\\", \\\"/hide\\\"],\\n ];\\n const kb = new Keyboard();\\n for (const row of rows) {\\n for (const label of row) kb.text(label);\\n kb.row();\\n }\\n return kb.resized().persistent();\\n}\\n\\nfunction escHtml(s: string): string {\\n return s.replace(/&/g, \\\"&\\\").replace(//g, \\\">\\\");\\n}\\n\\nexport const HELP_INTRO =\\n \\\"指令選單 — 點選任一指令即可查看說明。\\\\n\\\" +\\n \\\"需要參數的指令（例如 /sendfile <path>）仍請直接輸入。\\\";\\n\\nexport function renderCommandDetail(spec: CommandSpec): string {\\n return `${escHtml(spec.usage)}\\\\n${escHtml(spec.desc)}`;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Bot factory with rate-limit observer ─────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type RecoveryListener = () => void | Promise;\\n\\nexport interface BotSetupResult {\\n bot: Bot;\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => number;\\n onRateLimitRecovery: (fn: RecoveryListener) => () => void;\\n queuePendingMessage: (chatId: number, text: string) => void;\\n}\\n\\nexport function createBot(): BotSetupResult {\\n const bot = new Bot(config.telegramToken);\\n\\n bot.api.config.use(\\n autoRetry({\\n maxRetryAttempts: 3,\\n maxDelaySeconds: config.telegramAutoRetryMaxDelaySeconds,\\n })\\n );\\n\\n let rateLimitedUntil = 0;\\n let lastRateLimitSecs = 0;\\n let rateLimitChatId: number | undefined;\\n let rateLimitRecoveryTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\\n const pendingMessages: Array<{ chatId: number; text: string }> = [];\\n const rateLimitRecoveryListeners: Set = new Set();\\n\\n async function flushPendingMessages() {\\n const startCount = pendingMessages.length;\\n let flushed = 0;\\n while (pendingMessages.length > 0) {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil > Date.now()) {\\n console.warn(\\n `[rate-limit] flush paused mid-way: flushed ${flushed}/${startCount}, ${pendingMessages.length} remain`,\\n );\\n return;\\n }\\n const { chatId, text } = pendingMessages.shift()!;\\n try {\\n await bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text);\\n flushed++;\\n console.log(`[rate-limit] flushed queued message → chat ${chatId} (${flushed}/${startCount})`);\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] replay failed, requeueing:\\\", err);\\n pendingMessages.unshift({ chatId, text });\\n return;\\n }\\n await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 1100));\\n }\\n if (startCount > 0) {\\n console.log(`[rate-limit] flush complete: ${flushed}/${startCount} delivered`);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n bot.api.config.use(async (prev, method, payload, signal) => {\\n const res = await prev(method, payload, signal);\\n const retryAfter = (res as any)?.parameters?.retry_after;\\n if (typeof retryAfter === \\\"number\\\" && retryAfter > 0) {\\n const until = Date.now() + retryAfter * 1000;\\n const chatId = Number((payload as any)?.chat_id);\\n if (Number.isFinite(chatId)) rateLimitChatId = chatId;\\n if (until > rateLimitedUntil) {\\n rateLimitedUntil = until;\\n if (retryAfter > lastRateLimitSecs) lastRateLimitSecs = retryAfter;\\n console.warn(\\n `[rate-limit] Telegram 429: retry_after=${retryAfter}s chat=${\\n Number.isFinite(chatId) ? chatId : \\\"?\\\"\\n } method=${method} — pausing edits until ${new Date(until).toISOString()}`\\n );\\n if (rateLimitRecoveryTimer) {\\n clearTimeout(rateLimitRecoveryTimer);\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = null;\\n }\\n const waitMs = until - Date.now() + 500;\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = setTimeout(async () => {\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = null;\\n const peak = lastRateLimitSecs;\\n const target = rateLimitChatId;\\n lastRateLimitSecs = 0;\\n rateLimitedUntil = 0;\\n console.log(\\n `[rate-limit] recovered after ${peak}s — flushing ${pendingMessages.length} pending message(s)`\\n );\\n if (target === undefined) return;\\n try {\\n await bot.api.sendMessage(\\n target,\\n `⏳ Telegram 限流解除（等了 ${peak}s）— 現在可以正常收發訊息了。`\\n );\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] failed to send recovery notice:\\\", err);\\n }\\n for (const fn of Array.from(rateLimitRecoveryListeners)) {\\n try {\\n await fn();\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] recovery listener failed:\\\", err);\\n }\\n }\\n await flushPendingMessages();\\n }, waitMs);\\n }\\n }\\n return res;\\n });\\n\\n return {\\n bot,\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => rateLimitedUntil,\\n onRateLimitRecovery(fn: RecoveryListener) {\\n rateLimitRecoveryListeners.add(fn);\\n return () => rateLimitRecoveryListeners.delete(fn);\\n },\\n queuePendingMessage(chatId: number, text: string) {\\n pendingMessages.push({ chatId, text });\\n },\\n };\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":44,\"oldLines\":6,\"newStart\":44,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\" { name: \\\"relay\\\", button: \\\"🔁 relay\\\", usage: \\\"/relay \\\", desc: \\\"顯示 模型。不帶參數顯示當前模型與可用列表；帶參數切換（kiro/claude/gpt4o/gemini/deepseek/groq/local）。切換會重置對話。切 ACP CLI agent 請用 /agent。\\\", takesArg: true },\",\" { name: \\\"agent\\\", button: \\\"🤝 agent\\\", usage: \\\"/agent content.thinking:
The user is adding a command spec entry for the /session command in bot-setup.ts. This completes the command registration by adding it to the COMMAND_SPECS array, which is used for:
1. Help menu display (buildHelpMenuKeyboard)
2. Reply keyboard buttons (buildReplyKeyboard) 
3. Registering commands with Telegram's bot menu (registerBotCommands)
4. Command description display

The spec includes:
- name: "session"
- button: "🗂 session" (folder emoji)
- usage: "/session [new|rename|close] [名稱]"
- desc: Traditional Chinese description explaining multi-session management with inline keyboard, ACP session/load for full context restoration, park/new/rename/close operations, and requirement for ACP_SESSION_RESUME flag
- No takesArg flag since base command without args is valid (shows list)

This is positioned right after /agent command, which makes sense as they're both agent/session management commands.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added /session command spec to command menu</title>
  <subtitle>Registered session command in COMMAND_SPECS with button, usage, and description for help menu and Telegram bot commands</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>COMMAND_SPECS array in bot-setup.ts now includes session command entry at line 46</fact>
    <fact>Button label is "🗂 session" with folder emoji for session management visual metaphor</fact>
    <fact>Usage string "/session [new|rename|close] [名稱]" shows available subcommands</fact>
    <fact>Description explains multi-session management via inline keyboard with ACP session/load for context restoration, park/new/rename/close operations, and ACP_SESSION_RESUME requirement</fact>
    <fact>No takesArg flag set, allowing button execution to show session list</fact>
    <fact>Entry positioned after /agent command for logical grouping of agent/session management commands</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Added command specification entry for /session to the COMMAND_SPECS array in bot-setup.ts. The spec defines the command's appearance in the help menu (🗂 session button), usage syntax showing optional subcommands (new/rename/close with optional name parameter), and a Traditional Chinese description explaining the multi-session management feature. The description covers the inline keyboard list view with tap-to-switch functionality, ACP session/load mechanism for full context restoration, park operation preserving current session when creating new ones, rename and close subcommands, and the requirement to enable ACP_SESSION_RESUME flag. The entry was positioned immediately after the /agent command to group related agent and session management commands together. Unlike commands with takesArg:true, /session omits this flag because the base command without arguments is valid and shows the session list, making it button-executable. This registration integrates /session into the help menu, Telegram bot command list, and reply keyboard systems.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>

  </files_modified>
</observation>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>CommandDeps session interface contract</title>
  <subtitle>Commands access SessionManager through dependency injection interface exposing 10 session lifecycle methods</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>CommandDeps interface in deps.ts defines sessions object with get, peek, resetTurn, clearInactivityTimer, drop, cancel, enableDropAll, switchProvider, switchAgent, size, and shutdown methods</fact>
    <fact>peek(chatId) returns ChatSession or undefined for synchronous session lookup without spawning</fact>
    <fact>drop(chatId, closeReason) terminates session with optional reason string for logging</fact>
    <fact>switchAgent(chatId, backendKey, userId) switches ACP backend and returns new session with handoff</fact>
    <fact>switchProvider(chatId, type, userId) switches provider type and returns new session</fact>
    <fact>Dependency injection through initCommandDeps avoids circular imports between command modules and SessionManager</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Examined the CommandDeps interface contract which defines how command modules interact with SessionManager through dependency injection. The sessions object exposes 10 methods: get() for async session creation/retrieval, peek() for synchronous lookup without spawning, resetTurn/clearInactivityTimer for turn lifecycle management, drop() for termination with optional reason, cancel() for aborting active turns, enableDropAll() for /cancel all mode, switchProvider/switchAgent for backend transitions, size() for active count, and shutdown() for graceful cleanup. This interface abstraction allows command modules to remain decoupled from SessionManager implementation details while accessing session lifecycle operations. The peek() method is particularly useful for commands that need to check session state without triggering session creation, while drop() supports the /reset command with optional closeReason for logging and audit trails.</narrative>

    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>CommandDeps dependency injection architecture</title>
  <subtitle>Commands receive SessionManager access through injected deps object initialized once at startup to avoid circular imports</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>CommandDeps interface at deps.ts lines 11-57 defines injectable dependencies for command handlers</fact>
    <fact>Architecture avoids circular imports by having index.ts call initCommandDeps() once at startup</fact>
    <fact>Sessions object provides subset of SessionManager methods: get, peek, resetTurn, clearInactivityTimer, drop, cancel, enableDropAll, switchProvider, switchAgent, size, shutdown</fact>
    <fact>Interface includes isAllowed, sessions, runPrompt, commandHandlers, and utility functions for command implementations</fact>
    <fact>New session management commands will need park, switchSession, newSession methods exposed through this interface</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Examined the CommandDeps dependency injection architecture which provides command handlers with access to shared bridge functionality. The pattern solves circular import problems by having index.ts call initCommandDeps() once at startup to inject dependencies into a module-level variable that command handlers access through deps() function. The sessions object currently exposes 11 SessionManager methods covering session lifecycle (get/peek), turn management (resetTurn/clearInactivityTimer), termination (drop/cancel/enableDropAll), backend switching (switchProvider/switchAgent), and introspection (size/shutdown). The newly implemented /session command will require additional methods from Task 2 implementation—specifically park(), switchSession(), and newSession()—to be added to this interface contract so command handlers can orchestrate multi-session management operations.</narrative>

    <fact>Methods added after switchAgent at deps.ts lines 22-23 for logical grouping of session lifecycle operations</fact>
    <fact>switchSession signature matches SessionManager.switchSession() with chatId, targetId, and optional userId parameters</fact>
    <fact>newSession signature matches SessionManager.newSession() with chatId, optional userId, and optional name parameters</fact>
    <fact>Dependency injection enables /session command handlers to call these operations without direct SessionManager coupling</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Extended the CommandDeps interface to expose the newly implemented multi-session management methods from Task 2. Added switchSession(chatId, targetId, userId) and newSession(chatId, userId, name) to the sessions object contract, positioned after switchAgent for logical grouping of session lifecycle operations. The switchSession method accepts a target session ID and orchestrates the park-current-load-target sequence with optional user ID for session ownership tracking. The newSession method creates a fresh session with optional name parameter, parking the current session if one exists. These interface additions enable the /session command handlers (handleSession and handleSessionCallback) to orchestrate multi-session operations through dependency injection without tight coupling to SessionManager implementation details. The signatures mirror the SessionManager methods implemented in commit db557cd, completing the command-level wiring for multi-session management feature.</narrative>
